author: independent audit agent (not author of 6806f1f)

K2_causal_expression.reason: no behavioural decode exists; certified value is a MEMORY readout; coordinate switched dose->order post-hoc; committed code prints CHECK not PASS

K3_maintenance.note: dose significantly > null but sub-threshold; >0.50 NOT refuted and NOT certified; order maintenance absent

ESTABLISHED: rest own-history readout specificity (memory decode, beats within-world null, jackknife-stable, non-trivial)
SUPPORTED_WITH_QUALIFICATION: rest own-history readout as evidence toward causal expression (ratio only, not a behavioural decode)
NOT_ESTABLISHED_INDETERMINATE: K3 dose maintenance through deep turnover (significant vs null, sub-threshold, CI [0.14,0.72])
NEGATIVE_RESULT: order-coordinate maintenance through deep turnover (p=0.92 vs null)
FALSIFIED: strong-null: co-existing droplets cannot be locally individuated at all (rejected at rest)
SPECULATIVE: active reconstruction would restore deep-turnover maintenance (Exp 2 hypothesis)

decision_rationale: Not cleanly Case A: rest STORAGE confirmed but rest CAUSAL/behavioural expression not established, and deep-turnover dose is INDETERMINATE-positive (not a clean failure). Phase-B preconditions unmet: gate K2 was under-specified and resolved post-hoc; permutation-null and deep-decode scripts were uncommitted; K5 and 4 controls pending. Repair the gate and freeze it BEFORE running 52xxx.
